Headline: Partner at Resilient Markets
Summary: Offering a unique combination of experience across academia to industry, early technology development to full scale commercialization and engineering to business development. Experienced Senior Technical Advisor with a demonstrated history of working in the renewable energy and fuels industry. Skilled in Research and Development (R&D), Testing, Manufacturing, Quality Assurance and Project Management.  Strong Operations and Business Development experience with hardware and nano-tech start-ups through programs such as NSF Phase I (Principle Investigator) and through several start-up accelerator programs. Strong community and social services professional with a PhD in Material Science Engineering with a project focus in Chemical Engineering from Stony Brook University.
